rationale.D1: Confirmed 12 subsystems (HopperPivot, HopperIntake, Flywheel, Hood, Kicker, ActiveFloor, Module, Gyro, Vision, etc.) each have an @AutoLog inputs struct plus both a device-named hardware impl and an *IOSim impl; RobotContainer has a clean REAL/SIM/REPLAY factory switch — discounted the ActiveFloor and Kicker which lack Sim impls (use anonymous IO stubs in SIM mode).
rationale.D2: No Superstructure class exists; coordination is done via chained .alongWith()/.andThen() command composition in RobotContainer and AutoChooser — sophisticated but not a goal-request API with guarded transitions, so capped at L2.
rationale.D3: FlywheelIOSim uses WPILib FlywheelSim physics, HopperPivotIOSim uses SingleJointedArmSim, ModuleIOSim and VisionIOSim exist, and sim_logs/ is committed — drive + mechanisms covered; no maple-sim or whole-robot dynamics library, so capped at L2.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists at all; the CI workflow runs ./gradlew build only, not gradle test — D4=0.
rationale.D5: Confirmed full AdvantageKit: Robot extends LoggedRobot, Logger.processInputs() called on every subsystem's @AutoLog inputs struct, WPILOGWriter to USB on REAL and sim_logs/ in SIM, NT4Publisher, and REPLAY mode wired in Robot.java; elastic-layout.json committed — discounted replay being actively exercised (no replay IO variants confirmed).
rationale.D6: Multiple PathPlanner .path files actively consumed via AutoBuilder.followPath() in AutoChooser; LocalADStarAK pathfinder is set and Drive.pathfindToPose() via AutoBuilder.pathfindToPose() is implemented and used in driveToFieldPosition(); no Choreo files or time-optimal trajectories, so 2.5 (PathPlanner + on-the-fly pathfinding to pose).
rationale.D7: VisionIOPhoton confirmed multi-camera PhotonVision with separate position and rotation estimators, ambiguity rejection, per-camera std-dev tuning by tag count and distance; addVisionMeasurement called with computed stdDevs in Drive.periodic(); VisionIO interface with VisionIOSim — no TimeInterpolatableBuffer or dedicated RobotState class, so L3 not L4.
rationale.D8: No README (only WPILib-License.md), no CONTRIBUTING, no spotless/checkstyle in build.gradle; CI build-only; has 5 seasons tracked and elastic-layout.json committed showing operational care, but no onboarding docs or formatter — 1.5 (above bare code drop, below formal onboarding/standards).
